original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Jacob, Harper, Avery, and Noah. Jacob noted, "Harper is a knave and Avery is a knave". As Harper put it, "Jacob is not a knave". As Avery put it, "If Harper is a knave then Jacob is a knave". As Noah put it, "Harper is a knight and Jacob is a knave". So who is a knight and who is a knave?
